roa.docketEntryComment: APD ADD TO CALENDAR FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED

/CAL:APD ADD TO CALENDAR RE:RESTITUTION/X:AT APD'S REQUEST AN AMENDED CR-110 IS FILED FOR THE FOLLOWING:/X:VICTIM MING CHANG IS ORDERED RESTITUTIONIN THE AMOUNT OF $165,00, CO-DEFENDERS HODARI DARNEL WILSON, MC 17012459 &ANTOINE DAHMON WEAVER MC 17012449 ARE FOUND JOINT AND SEVERALLY LIABLE/X:VICTIM AMY LAM IS ORDERED RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $130,00, CO-DEFENDERSHODARI DARNEL WILSON, MC 17012459 & ANTOINE DAHMON WEAVER MC 17012449 AREFOUND JOINT AND SEVERALLY LIABLE/X:AMENDED CR-110'S FILED TO REFLECT THISCHANGE/

/CAL: RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:STIPULATION REACHED ON CR-110 RESTITUTIONAMOUNT,/X:CR-110 ORDERS FOR RESTITUTION (3) & CR-111 ABSTRACTS OF JUDGEMENT (3) SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT AND SERVED TO DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT TOPAY VICTIM YUK YIN LEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $547,13 PLUS FEE AND INTEREST AS INDICATED ON ORDER, DEFENDANT TO PAY VICTIM MING CHANG IN THE AMOUNT OF $165,00 PLUS FEE AND INTEREST AS INDICATED ON ORDER, DEFENDANT TO PAY VICTIM AMY LAM IN THE AMOUNT OF $130,00 PLUS FEE AND INTEREST AS INDICATED ON ORDER,/X: CR-115 PREVIOUSLY FILLED OUT BY DEFENDANT AND FILED IN OPEN COURT ON 09-25-18,/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT TO CCU TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS TO PAYRESTITUTION OWED/CTORD: NO FUTURE COURT DATES, DEFENDANT SHALL CONTINUE ONPROBATION

/CAL:SENTENCING/IBARRA/TWS/CH4:ISS:CPROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ 2D/CTS 2/VF2:150/WS//PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X:HARVEY WAIVER RESTITUTION FROM DISMISSEDCOUNTS INTO COUNT 4/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT,DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:04-23-18/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT30/DOPU:APD/
